title: Adaptive Learning Dashboard with Skill Trees
prompt: Build an adaptive learning platform dashboard that visualizes student progress through interactive skill trees. The interface should feature a clean and modern design aesthetic with a card-based grid structure, utilizing a soft blues and whites color palette throughout. Implement smooth micro-interactions animations to enhance the overall learning experience and maintain student engagement. The learning experience should be intuitive and accessible for users of all technical skill levels. Ensure the design prioritizes content readability and minimizes cognitive load. Include personalized learning path recommendations, progress rings for each subject, weekly study streak tracker.
negative_prompt: cluttered interface, no progress visualization, boring static pages, overwhelming information density
acceptance_criteria: Interface renders correctly on desktop and mobile devices
Core features are fully interactive and functional
Navigation follows clear visual hierarchy and intuitive patterns

website_card.headline: Adaptive Learning Dashboard with Skill Trees
website_card.summary: Builds an adaptive learning platform dashboard that visualizes student progress through interactive skill trees

website_card.headline: Personalized Study Hub with AI Recommendations

title: Microlearning Platform with Bite-Sized Lessons
prompt: Design a microlearning platform designed for busy professionals, featuring 5-minute interactive lessons.
